ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the school (District or Charter) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the school (number of students) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Official email address for the school */,
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal of the school */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the school was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent or guardian of the student */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact details for the student */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES parents ("parent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the staff member works */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique employee identifier for each staff member */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the staff member's role */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supervisor of the staff member */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary or hourly rate for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that owns the facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Maintenance status of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last facility inspection */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Scheduled maintenance dates for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "finances" (
  "finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for the financial record */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the financial record */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the school in that year */,
  "expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure for the school in that year */,
  "surplus_deficit" REAL /* Surplus or deficit for the school in that year */,
  "revenue_source" TEXT /* Source of revenue for the financial record */,
  "expenditure_category" TEXT /* Category of expenditure for the financial record */,
  "budget_variance" REAL /* Variance between budgeted and actual financials */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_finances_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school for the academic performance record */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject for which the performance data is recorded */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the school in that subject */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year for which the performance data is recorded */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the subject */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the teacher responsible for the academic performance record */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the policy applies to */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "policy_category" TEXT /* Category of the policy */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the event is taking place */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the staff member or student organizing the event */,
  "attendance_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that owns the resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource */,
  "resource_category" TEXT /* Category of the resource */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integration" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system integration */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school involved in the integration */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the external system integrated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the integration was last updated */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration */,
  "sync_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of synchronization with the external system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integration_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principals" (
  "principal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school where the principal is assigned */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the principal */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_principals_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parents" (
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parent or guardian */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parent or guardian */,
  "contact_details" TEXT /* Contact details for the parent or guardian */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parent_id")
)
